title: Factory Feature
description: A high-level intent that decomposes into multiple packets. Features are the unit of planning and approval; packets are the unit of execution.

id.description: Kebab-case unique identifier. Must match the filename (without .json).

intent.description: What the project should do when this feature is complete. Written by the human.

acceptance_criteria.description: Testable conditions that must all be true for this feature to be considered delivered. Each criterion must be independently verifiable.

packets.description: Ordered list of packet IDs that implement this feature.

approved_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the plan was approved. Null if not yet approved.

intent_id.description: ID of the source intent/spec artifact, if this feature was planner-generated.

planned_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the planner created this feature.
